definition: China faces a structural demographic reckoning already manifesting economically, with working-age population declining ~5M/year (accelerating to ~8M by 2030), a historically unprecedented TFR of ~1.0 at scale, and related economic deterioration in housing and prices.
evidence: Working-age population declining ~5M/year, accelerating to ~8M by 2030
TFR ~1.0 is historically unprecedented at scale
Housing starts collapsed from ~1.6B to <700M sqm
CPI near 0%, PPI negative for extended periods
open_questions: Whether urbanization buffer, automation, and policy capacity change the speed of decline
Whether TFR 1.0 can be reversed by policy intervention
